CustomField.description: System-managed counter recording how many Recurring Donation records failed processing in the most recent batch job. Automatically updated after each batch run. Non-zero values indicate errors that should be investigated in the Error Log. Do not modify manually.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: System-managed. Recurring Donations that failed processing in the last batch run. Check Error Log for details. Do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: Number of Failures
